publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Robert Zehnder was an amateur viticulturist in Summerville, South Carolina who specialized in breeding "southern" grapes.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, grape vouchers, card file, research, and notes.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Also see The Liberty Hyde Bailey Hortorium for grape hybrid vouchers, grape leaf pressings and notes from this collection.
Accession folder has photos of Zehnder, his grapes, and his vineyard. Some photos are on CD-ROM, also two video interview clips.
Forms part of the Eastern Wine and Grape Archive. (EWGA)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Robert J. Zehnder papers, #6763. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Titles taken from folders as labeled by Zehnder.

did.unittitle: Fennells 3way Hybrid, May 23, 1995, June 12-17, 2004, May 30, 1998, May 23, 1995
Ga 1-6-1 or 31-16-1 or 31-6-1 Higgins X F30 Seedling
Jack E. McCoy - Kaki Test Group Grifton N.C.
Background Charts/Analyses, June 1, 1996, July 1986, January 30, 1994, Nov 15, 1993, Jan 13, 1994, April 13, 1990, Sept 10, 1989
Background Charts, May 10, 1995, July 1988, April 13, 1990, January 28, 1993
A Practical Ampelography, Engineers' Cross Section Book
